body.title: DickSimnel: chat interface for direct conversation with Akien
body.description:
Akien needs to be able to talk directly to DickSimnel: ask what it's working on, explain a ticket, give corrections, probe its reasoning. Without this, the 2-week training period is flying blind.

Two pieces: (1) DickSimnel.chat(message) method that routes through BaseShim.handle_command() for skill verbs (/help, /health, etc.) and falls through to a short conversational inference call for freeform text; (2) web_server endpoint /dicksimnel/chat (POST message, GET recent) using the same HTTP-polling pattern as the Igor chat pane.

BaseShim.handle_command() is already the router — this ticket wires the transport layer.

**Affected files:** devices/dicksimnel/device.py, devices/web_server/server.py, tests/inference/test_dicksimnel_chat.py (new)

**Design rules:** no-sqlite; OOP-first; log interface crossing at INFO; web→DickSimnel uses HTTP poll (same pattern as web→Igor per memory feedback_web_ui_igor_path).

**Scope boundary:** In scope: DickSimnel.chat(message) method; /dicksimnel/chat POST and GET endpoints; conversational system prompt for freeform inference; skill verb passthrough via handle_command(). Out of scope: WebSocket, streaming, conversation history persistence (stateless per-message for v0.1), mobile UI.

**Completion criteria:** POST /dicksimnel/chat with message='hello' returns a non-empty response; /help routes to BaseShim skill list; freeform text triggers inference call; test_dicksimnel_chat.py green.
